positive: A minimalist, stylized geometric fox silhouette running through a stylized forest scene. The design should utilize bold, contrasting block colors (deep teal, burnt orange, and cream) with clean lines and high contrast. The fox is central and dynamic, surrounded by abstract floral and geometric patterns that mimic natural elements. The overall composition must be suitable for seamless textile printing, emphasizing negative space and graphic impact. Style: Flat vector illustration, linework, graphic design, pop art influence. Lighting: Uniform, bright, even studio light. Aspect: Centered and balanced for apparel art.
negative: photorealistic, 3d rendering, blur, noise, grainy, text, logo, watermark, messy, clutter, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, complex background, gradient, smudge, signature, jpeg artifacts
